arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Tottenham injury news in full ahead of North London Derby after Gabriel Jesus update
arts.sum: More than a dozen Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur players might miss the North London Derby tonight due to injury after Gabriel Jesus became the latest confirmed absentee. That is the only seemingly season-ending injury across the two teams, but several players are still many weeks away from being available again.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Arsenal and Manchester United gearing up for €50m transfer battle before month end
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Tottenham are all gearing up to make €50m bids for Brentford’s Bryan Mbuemo. That’s according to RMC Sport, who say all three are ‘monitoring’ the Brentford star. The Bees are ‘expecting a big cheque’ to be offered this month.
